items.title: Grab to buy Foodpanda Taiwan from Delivery Hero for $600 million
items.summary: Grab will acquire Delivery Hero’s Foodpanda business in Taiwan for $600 million, expanding beyond Southeast Asia and setting up a closer challenge to Uber Eats in a tightly contested market.

items.title: In-hub motors make this humble Hyundai a monster on ice
items.summary: In-wheel motors have been around since the very beginning of electric motoring. Ferdinand Porsche developed one way back in 1900, and the US sent them to the moon in our Lunar Roving Vehicles in the early '70s. But, outside of e-bikes, they've never really gone mainstream. It looked like Lordstown Motors would be their time […]

items.summary:
Today only, as part of its Deals of the Day offers, Best Buy has listed one of Lenovo’s 14-inch touchscreen 2-in-1 Chromebook Plus models for $399 shipped. This 2025 model typically goes for $579, and it’s currently fetching its full price directly at Lenovo. It saw its first deal last year during the Black Friday sale when it was down to $450, but today’s deal knocks an additional $51 off that price to mark a new best price to beat. This is one of the newer Chromebooks out there with a touchscreen panel and some other powerful hardware, and you can learn more about it below.

items.title: Elizabeth Warren calls Pentagon’s decision to bar Anthropic ‘retaliation’
items.summary: In a letter to Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) equated the DoD's decision to label Anthropic a "supply chain risk" as retaliation, arguing that the Pentagon could simply have terminated its contract with the AI lab.

items.title: FBI says Iranian hackers are using Telegram to steal data in malware attacks
items.summary: Hackers working for Iran’s government are using Telegram in hacking operations that use malware to target dissidents, opposition groups, and journalists who oppose its regime, according to the FBI.
